data.content: Implementation is complete and merged to main. All 4 planned files exist and pass quality gates (lint, typecheck, test, build). Key commits: deb3d885 (prompt builder), 9d3bbd1b (debug panel component), 013f5086 (submit fix), 13ebc43e (merge), 500874fb (integration into AgentHistoryView). The feature allows selecting a conversation in history view, opening a side debug panel with Expected/Actual outcome form, and launching an agent terminal session for investigation.
